description.zh-Hans: 将RGBA图像拆分为单个通道，或将多个通道合并为RGBA图像。
description.en: Splits an RGBA image into individual channels or combines channels into an RGBA image.

triggers.zh-Hans: 通道, 提取通道, 合并通道, RGB拆分, 灰度, 反色
triggers.en: channel, extract channel, combine channels, split RGB, grayscale, invert

exampleUsage.zh-Hans: 提取图像的红色通道用作遮罩。
exampleUsage.en: Extract the red channel from an image to use as a mask.
